hero.section-description: Browse skins, mark your favorites, and share your list — so your friends don’t have to guess what to gift you.

functionality.subtitle: Features
functionality.title: Everything you need for your collection
functionality.description: No unnecessary features — only what you actually use
functionality.search-and-filters-description: By champion, rarity, skin line, or color scheme. Finding a specific skin takes seconds.
functionality.wishlists-description: Collect skins into lists and share them with friends. Perfect for birthdays or just so you don’t forget.
functionality.collection-description: Upload your inventory and track what you’ve already bought, how much RP you’ve spent, and what you still want.

benefits.title: Everything you need — in one place

catalog.subtitle: Catalog
catalog.title: Find your next skin
catalog.description: Filter by champion, rarity, skin line, or color scheme

wishlists.title: Share it — and your friends will get the hint
wishlists.description: Create a list of desired skins and send a link. Public or private — your choice.

collection.title: Track everything you already own
collection.description: Upload your inventory and see how much RP you’ve spent and which skins you still want to add.

it-is-free: It’s free and takes less than a minute
